calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert Schoelzel, Jr., who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Barr Lumber Company, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on October 12, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 22, 2011.
Order waiving witness appearance at the default prove-up hearing was filed today, October 18, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert Schoelzel, Jr., and against the Defaulted Defendant Barr Lumber Company, Inc. as follows:

Principal - $77.40.
Costs - $333.00.

Total - $410.40.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
